subcodes.first_line: The Ocean of Divine Knowledge speaks forth from the Pole of Contingent Being, summoning all with spirit and fragrance unto the All-Merciful, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بحر العرفان ینطق فی قطب الامکان و یدع الکل بالروح و الریحان الی الرحمن ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
